name: DEFAULT视图-派生表查询
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tenant_code) VALUES (1, 'NO1', 1, 100, 'pending', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tenant_code) VALUES (2, 'NO2', 2, 200, 'done', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_order WHERE id IN (1,2)
description: 视图查询依赖元数据中已注册 mql_test_order_view 实体（含view_construct模板）。首次使用需点击页面'注册测试元数据'按钮。

name: 视图模板-@pf参数过滤
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tenant_code) VALUES (1, 'NO1', 1, 100, 'pending', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tenant_code) VALUES (2, 'NO2', 2, 200, 'done', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_order WHERE id IN (1,2)
description: 视图模板渲染 statusFilter=pending。注意 @pf 由 RuleService 层处理，直接解析需手动设置 viewTemplateParams。
